markdown:
# Ring of Resistance

- **Type**: RG|XDMG

You have [[resistance]] to one damage type while wearing this ring. The gemstone in the ring indicates the type, which the DM chooses or determines randomly by rolling on the following table.

| d10 | Damage Type | Gem |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | [[ring_of_acid_resistance]] | Pearl |
| 2 | [[ring_of_cold_resistance]] | Tourmaline |
| 3 | [[ring_of_fire_resistance]] | Garnet |
| 4 | [[ring_of_force_resistance]] | Sapphire |
| 5 | [[ring_of_lightning_resistance]] | Citrine |
| 6 | [[ring_of_necrotic_resistance]] | Jet |
| 7 | [[ring_of_poison_resistance]] | Amethyst |
| 8 | [[ring_of_psychic_resistance]] | Jade |
| 9 | [[ring_of_radiant_resistance]] | Topaz |
| 10 | [[ring_of_thunder_resistance]] | Spinel |
